title: T9 Voice: Samantha Q&A front door v1 — intake spec + samantha skill + OMI capture drain
prompt: Build the factory's spoken front door — the Q&A/intake agent intake.md calls Samantha. The voice channel already exists (OMI wearable -> omi-fetch pulse -> signal-enriched captures in ~/dev/ad/apps/omi-fetch/store/index.jsonl); docs/comms-flow.md par.3a names the missing piece: no consumer turns a capture into a ticket. Design-first (size L): ship (a) docs/samantha-spec.md — charter + hard laws (captures ideas and files tickets, NEVER spawns sessions; comms-flow par.8 Voice Law: voice surfaces read-only, the one sanctioned mutation is a David-approved ticket in engine/store/queue/), boundaries vs the Producer/Marshall/auto-consumer, two intake lanes (live conversation + OMI capture drain filtered to signal direction|idea), read-only Q&A surface (status.py, lookup.py, queue ls), read-back-gated triage protocol (ticket|note|skip, seen-ledger so nothing is silently lost), ticket contract reusing T2-01's emit-ticket.py (never a second emitter), edges, v1 limits, pilot protocol, open questions (name christening, auto-file threshold, shared emitter, wake-word); (b) a v1 skill at .claude/skills/samantha/ (SKILL.md trigger-only description + never-spawn/never-unapproved hard rules, plus stdlib-only intake-scan.py: read-only scan of the omi-fetch index with signal/since filters + append-only intake-seen.jsonl mark mode); (c) a fixture self-test proving scan/mark/emit mechanics in a scratch dir — NEVER the live queue, NEVER a write into omi-fetch's store; (d) doc wiring (intake.md Q&A-bot one-liner, human-comms.md name annotation, comms-flow par.3a PARTIALLY-closed annotation without deleting the gap, INDEX.md line) and a backlog pilot note for David's first live drain, which is HITL and outside this ticket's verify. This ticket does NOT build the always-on auto-consumer, any TTS/audio-out, a launchd agent, an intake/ dir, or any omi-fetch change. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T9-04-samantha-front-door.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: docs/samantha-spec.md exists and contains all 11 mandated sections (Charter & hard laws, Boundaries, two intake lanes, Q&A surface, Triage protocol, Ticket contract, Seen-ledger, Edges, v1 limits, First live drain, Open questions). .claude/skills/samantha/SKILL.md exists with a trigger-only 'Use when' description plus 'never spawn' and 'unapproved' hard rules. intake-scan.py --help exits 0; against a 2-row fixture index it lists the idea-signal row and excludes the noise row, --mark filed with a ticket id makes a re-scan return exit 3 (inbox empty), and --verdict bogus exits non-zero writing nothing. Negative: ls engine/store/queue/ | grep -ci 'dryrun\|samantha' returns 0; git status in ~/dev/ad/apps/omi-fetch shows no code changes; no live intake-seen.jsonl was committed; intake-scan.py contains no session-spawning code; docs/comms-flow.md still contains the MISSING gap text (annotated, not deleted). docs/INDEX.md, docs/intake.md and docs/comms-flow.md each reference samantha-spec; docs/human-comms.md carries the working-name annotation; exactly one backlog/*samantha-pilot.md exists; the feat(samantha) commit is pushed and git status is clean of the ticket's files.
